calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant SAMER KHALILI, Tel No. (415) 728-5778 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court precluded argument from Defendant as Defendant did not provide notice to the opposing side of his intent to appear. The Court adopted its tentative ruling with the sole modification to deny the motion without prejudice. DEFENDANT SAMER KHALILI'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is denied without prejudice. Defendant's Motion is procedurally defective, and fails to identify any legal basis for the relief sought. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-19-2014 Continued To Jan-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAMER KHALILI'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is continued to January 20, 2015 to give both parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Both parties must deliver courtesy copies of the papers they filed to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 19, 2014 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
